# ✨🌀✨K'IN GATHERING: KABAN AWAKENING✨🌀✨

The calendar turns.
The tribe gathers once again ✨

K'IN Gathering returns with a new edition inspired by the Mayan Kin 'Kaban', a symbol of movement, synchonicity, the heartbeat of the Earth, and the awakening of consciousness.

Kaban Awakening is a call to remember that everything is in constant motion - our bodies, the music, nature, and spirit. An invitation to align with natural rhythms, to dance with the living energy of the planet, and to activate a deeper collective awareness. 

This May, Dimensional Mayan Tribe opens the portal for a 3-day open-air ceremonial gathering where ancestral memory meets psychedelic sound!

## What to Expect
* 🔥 Sacred Fire
* 🔊 Multi-Stage Psychedelic Frequencies
* 🎨 Visionary Art
* 🌿 Conscious Tribe
* 🎟 B’ATZ’ INITIATION IS LIVE

If you feel the call… you already know!!

Secure your place inside the circle.

#DimensionalMayanTribe #KInGathering #UnderTheSun #Psytrance #techno 
#house #darkpsy #psytrancefamily

Gates to Xibalba II: The Return
A 3-day open-air Psytrance gathering celebrating the sacred bond between the living and the dead.

# 🔥 Gates to Xibalba II: The Return 🔥

A 3-day open-air Psytrance gathering celebrating the sacred bond between the living and the dead.

Hidden deep beneath the Earth lies Xibalbá, the Mayan underworld—a realm of shadow, mystery, and transformation. Once again, the Ajawab, Lords of Xibalba, stir in their domains as the veil between worlds grows thin.
This Day of the Dead, the Dimensional Mayan Tribe reopens the sacred gates for the second time. The path is calling once more. Those brave enough to walk it must descend through sound, fire, and darkness—crossing rivers of energy, light, and rhythm.

🌀 Gates to Xibalba is not just a festival—
It is a ceremony, a remembrance, and a return.
We gather to awaken ancestral memory and walk between dimensions, where ancient spirits meet modern beats.
This is a ritual of unity—of tribe, trance, and transformation.
🔥 At the Fire Ceremony, we’ll channel our highest vibrations through dance, intention, and collective energy.

✨🌀 ✨🌀 ✨🌀 ✨🌀 ✨🌀 ✨🌀 ✨🌀 ✨ 🌀✨ 🌀

🚯 THIS IS A LEAVE NO TRACE EVENT: Please respect the land. Bring trash bags and take everything you bring with you. Let’s leave the portal cleaner than we found it.

🛍️ Expect food vendors on-site, and a small marketplace of artisans and creatives.
We still encourage you to bring your own provisions to last the weekend.

🎭 Costumes are highly encouraged! Be as mythical, spooky, tribal, or cosmic as you wish. Let the spirits see you shine!


🌌 Join us again—where time bends, music transforms, and the veil lifts.

TOGETHER, WE RETURN TO XIBALBA!

Come together as one tribe under the ancient wisdom of the Yaxche, the Tree of Life, to celebrate the cosmic connection that unites us all.

# YAXCHE

In Mayan cosmology, the Yaxche represents the sacred Tree of Life that connects the physical and spiritual realms, with its branches reaching out towards the heavens and roots digging deep into the underworld.

The Yaxche symbolizes the Axis Mundi, a bridge between worlds, and embodies the cycles of life, death, and rebirth. It's a symbol of unity, harmony, and balance that reminds us of our connection to the natural world and the cosmos. In Mayan tradition, the Yaxche is revered as a source of wisdom, guidance, and spiritual growth.

Let's come together as one tribe under the ancient wisdom of the Yaxche, the Tree of Life, to celebrate the cosmic connection that unites us all. We long to explore the roots of our collective consciousness, reach for the leaves of higher states of being and spiritual growth, and connect with our community.

Quantum Frequencies Festival - Astrix, Ave Ventura, Interactive Noise
Featuring some of the biggest names on the scene ASTRIX, ACE VENTURA, INTERACTIVE NOISE, and direct support from amazing local DJs

# Quantum Frequencies Festival - Astrix, Ave Ventura, Interactive Noise

This is the most anticipated psytrance party of the year, featuring some of the biggest names on the scene ASTRIX, ACE VENTURA, INTERACTIVE NOISE, and direct support from amazing local DJs. Prepare to immerse yourself in a euphoric journey of mind-bending sounds as these legendary artists take you on a sonic adventure through the realms of psychedelic trance. We look forward to seeing our tribe out there on the dancefloor in full motion! Let's give it up for these Psytrance maestros showing us how it's really done.

We are excited to bring the tribe together once again to witness the pinnacle of psytrance in Texas. This is an event you don't want to miss, so don't sleep on it and go grab your tickets before they sell out!

Welcome to Baaxal, a holding space for kindred souls from all corners of the world to come together and celebrate life.

# 🔹🛑🔸BAAXAL🔸🛑🔹
# 🌀Summer gathering 🌀

Welcome to Baaxal, a holding space for kindred souls from all corners of the world to come together and celebrate life.

As the sun sets over the horizon the atmosphere fills with hypnotic basslines ethereal melodies and of psychedelic trance music, beckoning the tribe to dance in unison. Baaxal isn't just a gathering.. it's a journey of sound, spirit, and collective euphoria. Come play with us and experience a night of pure bliss. Let go of inhibitions and rediscover the innocence and wonder of youth as you dance under the starlit sky.

There will be a food vendor on site and a couple other pop up vendors. We highly encourage everyone to bring their own food and beverages to last for the weekend.

This is a LEAVE NO TRACE event, we kindly ask that you bring your own trash bags and be mindful of your camping area.

Itzamna brings scientific and technological innovations by combining the elements of the earth, the underworld, and the heavens

# ☀️ 🌖🔹ITZAMNA PSYTRANCE FESTIVAL🔹🌖☀️

In various myths, Itzamna is depicted as an old priest sitting on a throne wearing a tall cylindrical headdress that resembles a flower. He is commonly depicted as half caiman and half human, and is sometimes referred to as a two-headed underwater serpent. Another significant manifestation of Itzamna is the Bird of Heaven, which is also known as Itzam Yeh.

Itzamna is credited with bringing scientific and technological innovations to the Mayans by combining the elements of the earth, the underworld, and the heavens. He is regarded as a creator who made systems and processes that can only be described as scientific or logical. According to legend, Itzamna taught the Maya how to create various types of calendars which would be used to determine the ideal days for various activities such as farming and religious worship.

Itzamna was known to have provided the Maya with the foundations of civilization by reportedly teaching them how to grow corn, how to practice medicine, and how to follow the celestial movements of the sky.

--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_--_

This is a LEAVE NO TRACE event, we kindly ask that you bring your own trash bags and be mindful of your camping area.

Hidden beneath the depths of the Earth, lies a world of darkness ruled by mysterious gods and terrifying creatures.

# 🔥 Gates to Xibalba 🔥

Hidden beneath the depths of the Earth, lies a world of darkness ruled by mysterious gods and terrifying creatures. This place is Xibalbá, the Mayan underworld ruled by the Ajawab, Lords of Xibalbá. The underground kingdom that houses the spirits of all human beings after their life on earth.

Mayans believed that this hidden place could be accessed through caves and cenótes. To get there, it involved making a long descent down a huge staircase, in addition to crossing rivers of water and blood. For this reason, the ancient Mayas buried their dead with water, food, weapons, and other objects as the souls would need provisions for their journey. Nowadays, as part of the Day of the Dead "Dia de Los Muertos" celebration, we provide offerings to the deceased so that they do not lack anything in the next life.

In this time of year, our ancestors prepare once again for their journey back home as the gateway to the subterranean world awaits to be opened.

An altar will be set to honor our deceased loved ones. Everybody is welcome to bring photographs, candles, seasonal flowers, a sample of their favorite drinks and meals, a special object, drawings, etc., and place them in the altar as we welcome the pixano'ob (souls) who come visit from the underworld.

Join us as we celebrate this sacred Psytrance gathering between the living and the dead. Let's light the sacred fire at the opening ceremony and offer our stomps and dances as we channel our highest vibrational states as one tribe.

There will be a food vendor on site and a couple other pop up vendors. We highly encourage everyone to bring their own food and beverages to last for the weekend.

This is a LEAVE NO TRACE event, we kindly ask that you bring your own trash bags and be mindful of your camping area.

Welcome to the new Dimensional Mayan Tribe site
Exploring the depths of human consciousness

# Welcome to the Dimensional Mayan Tribe blog

This is the first post on our new blog on our new website!~ We have plans for more content, event information, dedicated lineups and more so stay tuned. 

## What Makes This Special?

The DMT website pushes the boundaries of what we are able to do as a Psytrance event organization.

- **Event Schedule** We now have a dedicated space for an event schedule!
- **Content Space** A place we can bring you content outside of social media.
- **Creative Control** 100% crew developed, we have complete creative control.

## The Technology

We utilized some of the latest technology but kept it simple:

- Netlify
- Astro
- Three.js


## Motion and Beauty

Aesthetically pleasing animations give you something fun to look at while you browse.

## What's Next?

This is still a work in progress and will continue to be updated. Come back soon for more content.
